summary: Complete redesign of ManoProtect home page (HighConversionLanding.js) verified. All 12 test cases passed: Hero section with correct title 'Protege a tu familia frente a emergencias y estafas digitales', subtitle, and two CTA buttons; Benefits section with 4 cards; 'Cómo funciona' with 3 steps; SOS Demo with animated button and 4 steps; Trust Stats with 4 stats and 5 seals; Referral banner; FAQ with 8 questions; sitemap.xml with 42 URLs; robots.txt properly configured.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home page redesign complete. All sections verified: Hero (data-testid=hero-section, hero-title, hero-subtitle, hero-cta-main, hero-cta-trial), Benefits (data-testid=benefits-section, benefit-card-0 to 3, benefits-cta), How Works (data-testid=how-section, step-0 to 2, how-cta), SOS Demo (data-testid=sos-demo-section, sos-demo-button, sos-step-0 to 3), Trust Stats (data-testid=trust-stats-section, trust-stat-0 to 3, trust-seal-0 to 4), Referral (data-testid=referral-section), FAQ (data-testid=faq-section, faq-0 to 7). Note: Urgency popup appears after 8 seconds - close it first before testing.
